nasb.text: Does any one of you, when he has a case against his neighbor, dare to go to law before the unrighteous and not before the saints?

esv.text: When one of you has a grievance against another, does he dare go to law before the unrighteous instead of the saints?

cnv.text: 你們中間有人和弟兄起了爭執，怎敢告到不義的人面前，卻不告在聖徒面前呢？

ccb.text: 你们中间发生了纠纷，不找圣徒审理，竟敢告到不义的人面前吗？

csbs.text: 你们中间，当一个与另一个有了问题，怎么敢告到不义的人面前，而不告到圣徒面前呢？
